subject: A Super Saiyan warrior with upright spiky golden hair wearing dark bodysuit/armor, crouching in a powerful low stance with purple and white energy crackling around them.
description: A Super Saiyan fighter crouches in a low, powerful stance against a dark background with swirling purple and white energy. The figure has upright spiky golden hair and wears dark-colored body armor — distinguishable from Goku's orange gi. The crouching pose emphasizes compressed power about to be unleashed. Purple-tinted energy crackles around the figure in contrast to the typical golden energy seen on other Saiyan cards in this batch, giving a slightly darker, more ominous quality. The background is deep purple and black with swirling energy lines.
foreground: Super Saiyan fighter in dark armor, crouching low stance, purple-white energy crackling
background: Deep purple and black swirling energy
emotion: Coiled aggression — low crouch, restrained fury, darker energy signature than heroic Saiyans
